entries.summary: Phase 4 API/Engine layer audit complete. 3 tasks dispatched (api_server.py, rag_engine+engine_factory+main.py, llm_interface.py). 5 false positives caught by architect. 53 total findings across 3 evidence files. Highest-risk findings: absolute path bypass in validation functions, information disclosure in error handlers, dead streaming code with type errors, no runtime fallback in SmartLLM.
